Footer.description: We have clothes that suits your style and which you're proud to wear. From women to men.
Footer.terms_description: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using our services.

Support.title: Customer Support
Support.description: Questions about your silver jewelry order, sizing, or care? Our team is here to guide you with fast, thoughtful help.
Support.hero_image_alt: Silver Glow customer support team in a luxury jewelry boutique
Support.care_desc: From choosing the right silver piece to keeping its shine, we help you before and after every order — because fine jewelry deserves attentive support.
Support.care_image_alt: Silver Glow jewelry care packaging with sterling silver pieces
Support.contact_desc: Pick the channel that suits you — we're ready to help with orders, returns, and silver jewelry advice.
Support.email_desc: Ask any question or report an issue and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
Support.phone_desc: Available from 9 AM to 6 PM daily for urgent inquiries about your order.
Support.chat_desc: Chat with our team for quick help with sizing, silver care, and product recommendations.
Support.faq_desc: Quick answers about orders, returns, and shipping for your silver jewelry.
Support.faq_track_question: How do I track my order?
Support.faq_track_answer: Log into your account and visit "My Orders". You'll also receive a tracking link by email once your silver jewelry ships.
Support.faq_return_answer: We offer a 14-day return policy for unworn sterling silver pieces in original condition. See our Terms & Conditions for full details.
Support.faq_shipping_answer: We currently focus on domestic shipping across Egypt and are expanding to serve more regions soon.

Delivery.title: Delivery Details
Delivery.description: Find all the information you need about our shipping methods, costs, and estimates.
Delivery.tracking_desc: Once your order is shipped, we will send you a tracking number and a link to trace your package in real-time until it reaches your doorstep.
Delivery.insurance_desc: Your orders are fully insured during transit. If any package gets lost or damaged, we will replace it or refund your payment immediately.
Delivery.note: Note: Delivery times are estimates and may vary during national holidays and sales seasons.

Features.title: Why Silver Glow
Features.description: A refined shopping experience built around authentic sterling silver — from discovery to delivery and beyond.
Features.hero_image_alt: Shopping sterling silver jewelry with Silver Glow
Features.experience_desc: Every feature is crafted to make buying silver jewelry effortless — browse curated collections, shop with confidence, and enjoy support that understands fine jewelry.
Features.experience_image_alt: Silver Glow premium shopping experience with sterling silver jewelry
Features.grid_desc: Thoughtful features that elevate how you discover, buy, and care for your silver pieces.
Features.fast_delivery_desc: Your silver jewelry arrives carefully packaged at your doorstep within 48–72 hours in major cities.
Features.secure_payments_desc: Shop with peace of mind through encrypted checkout and trusted payment options.
Features.easy_returns_desc: Not the perfect fit? Return unworn sterling silver pieces within 14 days with a simple process.
Features.support_desc: Our team helps with sizing, silver care, orders, and returns — whenever you need guidance.
Features.smart_search_desc: Find rings, necklaces, and bracelets quickly with filters tailored to style, category, and section.
Features.jewelry_guide_desc: Learn how to keep your sterling silver shining with practical tips on storage, cleaning, and daily wear.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.
Privacy.section1_body: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, phone number, and physical address when you create an account or make a purchase.
Privacy.section2_body: The information we collect is used to process your orders, improve our services, and communicate with you about your account and our latest collections.
Privacy.section3_body: We use advanced security protocols to protect your personal data from unauthorized access or disclosure during transmission and storage.
Privacy.section4_body: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Your information is only shared with trusted service providers to facilitate your orders and payments.
Privacy.section5_body: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience and personalize the content we show you. You can manage your cookie preferences in your browser settings.

Works.title: Our Works
Works.description: Take a look at our latest collections and how we bring fashion to life.
Works.showcase1_desc: Our latest collection focuses on comfort and versatility, perfect for the modern urban lifestyle. We've used breathable fabrics and timeless designs that transition seamlessly from day to night.
Works.showcase2_desc: We've partnered with local manufacturers to produce a line of clothing made from 100% recycled materials, reducing waste and supporting fair labor practices without compromising on style.
Works.cta_desc: Follow us on our social media channels to get daily updates on our design process and upcoming collections.

About.title: About Silver Glow
About.description: We craft sterling silver jewelry that captures light, elegance, and everyday luxury — designed to be worn, cherished, and passed on.
About.hero_image_alt: Premium sterling silver jewelry collection by Silver Glow
About.mission_body: At Silver Glow, we believe silver is more than metal — it is a quiet statement of refinement. Our mission is to offer beautifully crafted sterling silver jewelry that feels personal, lasts for years, and shines in every moment of your day.
About.mission_image_alt: Silver Glow sterling silver necklace and ring collection
About.history_body: Every piece begins with skilled hands and genuine 925 silver. From sketch to polish, we focus on precise detailing, comfortable wear, and finishes that preserve silver's natural glow — because fine jewelry should feel as exceptional as it looks.
About.history_image_alt: Artisan crafting a sterling silver ring
About.values_desc: Thoughtfully made silver jewelry with the quality, honesty, and finish your collection deserves.
About.quality_desc: We use authentic sterling silver for lasting brilliance, skin-friendly comfort, and jewelry you can trust.
About.craft_desc: Each design is shaped with care — polished edges, balanced proportions, and details made to elevate your everyday style.
About.trust_desc: From packaging to after-purchase support, we stand behind every piece with transparent quality and dedicated service.

Validation.email_too_long: Email must be less than 500 characters
Validation.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters
Validation.password_max: Password must be less than 255 characters
Validation.password_regex: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number
Validation.name_too_long: Name must be less than 500 characters
Validation.phone_too_long: Phone number must be less than 20 characters
Validation.address_too_long: Address must be less than 500 characters
Validation.picture_too_long: Picture URL must be less than 500 characters
